# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x5
li a1, 0x7
add a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xc

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, x0, -1
addi t1, x0, 1
add t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, 5
addi x6, x0, 10
add x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 15

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x1, x0, 5
addi x2, x0, 7
add x3, x1, x2
# Result: x3 = 12

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, -1
addi a1, x0, 1
add a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, -1
# Result: x5 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, -1
# Result: x5 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, x0, 1
slli t0, t0, 63
addi t1, t0, -1
addi t1, t1, 1
# Result: t1 = 0x8000000000000000

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, 5
# Result: a0 = 5

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x6, x0, 42
addi x5, x6, 0
# Result: x5 = 42

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, -1
addiw a1, a0, 1
# Result: a1 = 0

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, x0, 1
slli t0, t0, 32
addiw t2, t0, -1
# Result: t2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
lui a0,0x80000
addiw a0,a0,0
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffff80000000

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
lui x1,0x7ffff
addi x1, x1, -1
addiw x2, x1, 1
# Result: x2 = 0xffffffff80000000

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x5, 0x123456787FFFFFFF
addiw x6, x5, 1
# Result: x6 = 0xffffffff80000000

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, zero, 1
slli t0, t0, 31
addiw t1, t0, 0
# Result: t1 = 0xffffffff80000000

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, -1
li t1, 2
addw t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x7fffffff
li a1, 1
addw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xffffffff80000000

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, -2147483648
li a1, 1
addw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xffffffff80000001

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, -1
addi x6, x0, 1
addw x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 0

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, x0, 0xAA
addi t1, x0, 0x55
and t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, 42
addi x6, x0, 12
and x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 8

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, x0, 42
addi t1, x0, 51
and t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 34

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, -1
addi a1, x0, 0xaa
and a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xaa

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, -1
li a1, 0x7FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
and a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x7FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, x0, -1
addi t1, x0, -1
and t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x5,0xAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
li x6,0x5555555555555555
and x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 0

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0xFF00FF00FF00FF00
li a1, 0x0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0F
andn a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xF000F000F000F000

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, x0, -1
andi t1, t0, 0xFF
# Result: t1 = 0xFF

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, -1
andi a1, a0, 0xF0
# Result: a1 = 0xF0

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, 255
andi x6, x5, -1
# Result: x6 = 255

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x123
andi t1, t0, 0xF0
# Result: t1 = 0x20

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x6, x0, -2
andi x5, x6, -2
# Result: x5 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, 0x7ff
andi x5, x5, 0x555
# Result: x5 = 0x555

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, 0x123
andi a1, a0, 0xff
# Result: a1 = 0x23

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc a0, 74565
# Result: a0 = 0x923451e6

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc a0, 0x123
# Result: a0 = 0x801231e6

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc a0, 0x80000
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffff800001e6

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 0x800011e6

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc t0,0x12345
# Result: t0 = 0x923451e6

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc t0, 0
jalr zero, 8(t0)
addi a0, zero, 0x42
# Result: a0 = 0x42

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc t0, 0
lw t1, 0(t0)
# Result: t1 != 0

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
auipc t0, 0
# Result: t0 = 0x800001e6

# Extension Must Be Active: C
li x5, 5
li x6, 7
# Result: x5 = 12

# Extension Must Be Active: C
li a0, 5
li a1, 7
# Result: a0 = 12

# Extension Must Be Active: C
li a0, 0
li a0, 1
# Result: a0 = 0

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x5, 5
# Result: x5 = 5

# Extension Must Be Active: C
# Result: x5 = 10

# Extension Must Be Active: C
# Result: a0 = 5

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
# Result: x5 = 5

# Extension Must Be Active: C
li x5, 0x1FFFFFFFF
# Result: x5 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Extension Must Be Active: C
li a0, 0x80000001
mv a1, a0
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffff80000001 & a1 = 0xffffffff80000001

# Extension Must Be Active: C
li x5, -1
li x6, 1
# Result: x5 = 0

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, zero, 5
addi t1, zero, 3
# Result: t0 = 8

# Extension Must Be Active: C
li a0, 10
li a1, 5
# Result: a0 = 15

# Extension Must Be Active: RVC
li a0, 0xFF00FF00
li a1, 0x0F0F0F0F
# Result: a0 = 0x0F000F00

# Extension Must Be Active: C
li a0, 0xFF00FF00FF00FF00
li a1, 0x0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0F
# Result: a0 = 0x0F000F000F000F00

# Extension Must Be Active: RVC
addi a0, x0, 0xF
addi a1, x0, 0x5
# Result: a0 = 0x5

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 5
andi a0, a0, 3
# Result: a0 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: C
li a0, 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF1
# Result: a0 = 0x1

# Extension Must Be Active: C
addi a0, x0, 5
addi a1, x0, 3
# Result: a0 = 0x7

# Extension Must Be Active: C
addi t0, zero, 5
addi t1, zero, 3
# Result: t0 = 0x7

# Result: a0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Extension Must Be Active: C
addi a0, x0, 1
# Result: a0 = 0x20

# Extension Must Be Active: Zkt

# Result: x8 = 0x20

# Extension Must Be Active: Zkt
li a0, -8
# Result: a0 = 0xfffffffffffffffc

# Result: s0 = 0x55

# Result: s0 = 0x0FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF

# Extension Must Be Active: Zkt

# Extension Must Be Active: C

li s1, 0x6
# Result: s0 = 0x5

# Extension Must Be Active: C
li a0, 0x12345678
li a1, 0xdeadbeef
# Result: a0 = 0xcc99e897

# Result: x5 = 0xff

# Extension Must Be Active: Zca
li a0, 0x12345678
li a1, 0xdeadbeef
# Result: a0 = 0xcc99e897

# Extension Must Be Active: Zcb
addi a0, x0, 0x0f
addi a1, x0, 0xf0
# Result: a0 = 0xff

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, 10
addi a1, zero, 3
div a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 3

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li a1, 123
div a2, a0, a1
rem a3, a0, a1
mul a4, a2, a1
add a5, a4, a3
# Result: a5 = 12345

li t0, 5
div t1, t0, x0
# Result: t1 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li t1, -1
div t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0x8000000000000000

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li a2, 3
divu a0, a1, a2
# Result: a0 = 3

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li a1, 0

# Result: a2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li a1, -1
divu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, x0, -10
addi t1, x0, 3
divw t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0xfffffffffffffffd

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0xffffffff00000002
li a2, 2
divuw a0, a1, a2
# Result: a0 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 10
li a1, 3
div a2, a0, a1
rem a3, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 3 & a3 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 100
li a1, 3
divu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 33

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, 10
addi a1, x0, 3
divu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 3

# Result: t2 = 0

li a1, 0

# Result: a2 = 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF

li x11, -1
divu x12, x10, x11
# Result: x12 = 0

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, 10
addi a1, zero, 3
divu a2, a0, a1
remu a3, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 3 & a3 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a1, x0, 10
addi a2, x0, 2
divu a0, a1, a2
or a3, a0, x0
# Result: a0 = 5

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, 100
addi a1, x0, 7
divu a2, a0, a1
remu a3, a0, a1
mul a4, a2, a1
add a4, a4, a3
# Result: a4 = 100

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, 0x10
addi a1, zero, 4
divuw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 4

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t1, zero, -1
addi t2, zero, 1

# Result: t0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li t1, 0x1234567800000000
divuw t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li t1, 0x00000002
divuw t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 4

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: x6 = 0xfffffffffffffffd

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a2 = 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFD

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, -7
addi a1, zero, 2
divw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = -3

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, 100
addi a1, zero, 7
divw a2, a0, a1
remw a3, a0, a1
mulw t0, a1, a2
addw t0, t0, a3
xor t1, t0, a0
sltiu t1, t1, 1
# Result: t1 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x1, 10
divw x5, x1, x0
# Result: x5 = 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: t0 = 0xffffffff80000000

# Result: a2 = 0xffffffff80000000

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

or x10, x10, x13
addi x11, x0, 2
divw x12, x10, x11
# Result: x12 = 0xffffffffc0000000

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
lui a0, 0x1
# Result: a0 = 0x1000

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
lui t0, 0xABCDE
# Result: t0 = 0xABCDE000

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a0 = 0xffffffff80000000

# Result: a2 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# Extension Must Be Active: M
li x5, 3
li x6, 5
mul x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 15

# Extension Must Be Active: Zmmul
csrr t0, misa
li t1, 0x1000
not t1, t1
and t0, t0, t1
csrw misa, t0
li a0, 6
li a1, 7
mul a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 42

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, 5
addi a1, zero, 3
mul a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0

# Extension Must Be Active: M
addi x5, x0, 3
addi x6, x0, 4
mul x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 12

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a1, x0, -1
lui a2, 0x1
addi a2, a2, 2
mul a0, a1, a2
srl a0, a0, 32
# Result: a0 != 0xffffffff

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x1
slli t0, t0, 32
li t1, 0x2
slli t1, t1, 32
mulh t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 2

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 5
li t1, 3
mulh t2, t0, t1
mul t3, t0, t1
# Result: t3 = 15

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x1, x0, 3
addi x2, x0, 4
mulh x3, x1, x2
mul x4, x1, x2
# Result: x3 = 0

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x10, 0x100000001
mulhu x11, x10, x10
mul x12, x10, x10
# Result: x11 = 0x1 & x12 = 0x200000001

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x7FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
li a1, 0x7FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
mulh a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x3FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, x0, -1

mulh t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Extension Must Be Active: M
li a0, 0x7FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
li a1, 0x7FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
mulh a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x3FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

addi x11, x0, -2
mulh x12, x10, x11
mul x13, x10, x11
# Result: x12 = 0x1 & x13 = 0

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a2, x0, 3
addi a3, x0, 5
mulh a4, a2, a3
mul a5, a2, a3
# Result: a5 = 15

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x5, 0
li x6, 0
mulh x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 0

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x7FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
li t1, -1

# Result: t2 = 0x7FFFFFFFFFFFFFFE

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x6, -1
li x7, 2
mulhsu x5, x6, x7
# Result: x5 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li a1, -1

# Result: a2 = 0x7FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, zero, -1
addi t1, zero, 2
mulhsu t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, -1
li a2, 1
mulhsu a0, a1, a2
# Result: a0 = 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, -1
li a2, 2
mulhu a0, a1, a2
# Result: a0 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, -1
addi a1, x0, 2
mulhu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, -1
li a1, 2
mulhu t0, a0, a1
mul t1, a0, a1
# Result: t0 = 0x1 & t1 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x10, 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
li x11, 2
mulhu x12, x10, x11
or x13, x12, x0
# Result: x12 = 0x1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x5, 0xffffffffffffffff
li x6, 2
mulhu x7, x5, x6
mul x8, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 0x1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, -1
li a2, 2
mulw a0, a1, a2
# Result: a0 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, 3
addi a1, x0, 4
mulw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 12

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: x7 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# Result: a0 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# Extension Must Be Active: Zmmul
li t0, 0x12345678
li t1, 3
mulw t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0x369d0a2e

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0F

or a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0F
li a1, 0xF0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0
or a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0xF0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0
li t1, 0x0F0F0F0F0F0F0F0F
or t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x1, x0, -1
addi x2, x0, 1
or x3, x1, x2
# Result: x3 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, x0, 0xF0F0
addi t1, x0, 0x0FF0
or t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0xFFF0

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, 5
addi a1, x0, 3
addi a2, x0, 0
czero.nez a3, a0, a1
# Result: a3 = 0x7

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x5
li t1, 0x3
li t2, 1
czero.eqz t2, t2, x0
or t3, t0, t1
# Result: t3 = 0x7

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, 0xF0
ori x6, x5, -0x100
# Result: x6 = -16

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
ori t0, x0, -1
# Result: t0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x5, 0x12345678abcdef01
ori x6, x5, -2048
# Result: x6 = 0xffffffffffffff01

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 10
li t1, 3
div t2, t0, t1
rem t3, t0, t1
# Result: t3 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t1, x0, -10
addi t2, x0, 3
rem t0, t1, t2
# Result: t0 = -1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x12345678
rem a2, a0, x0
# Result: a2 = 0x12345678

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x8000000000000000
li a1, -1
rem a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, -1
li a1, 2
remu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
lui t0, 0x80000
addi t0, t0, 5
addi t1, x0, 3
remuw t2, t0, t1
remuw t3, t0, x0
# Result: t2 = 0x1 & t3 = 0xffffffff80000005

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x123456789ABC
li a1, 0x11223344
div a2, a0, a1
rem a3, a0, a1
mul a4, a2, a1
add a4, a4, a3
xor t0, a4, a0
# Result: t0 = 0

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a1, x0, 10
addi a2, x0, 3
remu a0, a1, a2
# Result: a0 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x0000000100000005
li t1, 0x0000000200000003
remuw t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 2

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, -1
li a1, 3
remu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x80000001
li a1, 0
remuw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xffffffff80000001

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, -1
li a1, 2
remu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x12345678ABCDEF01
li a1, 0
remu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x12345678ABCDEF01

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 42
li a1, 0
remu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 42

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, 10
addi a1, x0, 3
remu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0xffffffff
li a1, 2
remuw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, -2
addi a1, x0, -1
remuw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = -2

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x6, 0x80000001
li x7, 0
remuw x5, x6, x7
# Result: x5 = 0xffffffff80000001

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x12345678
li a1, 0
remuw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x12345678

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, 10
addi a1, x0, 3
remuw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, zero, -5
addi t1, zero, 2
remw t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0xffffffff

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 5
li a2, 0xFFFFFFFF00000002
remw a0, a1, a2
# Result: a0 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, -10
addi x6, x0, 3
remw x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x80000001
li t1, 0
remw t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0xffffffff80000001

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, -2147483648
li t1, -1
remw t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, -5
addi a1, x0, 2
remw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, 0xFF
addi a1, zero, 8
sll a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xff00

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, 1
addi a1, x0, 53
sll a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0x200000

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x1
li a1, 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFC0
sll a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, 15
addi x6, x0, 2
sll x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 60

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, 15
slli ra, a0, 2
# Result: ra = 60

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, 15
slli x6, x5, 2
# Result: x6 = 60

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, 1
slli a1, a0, 3
# Result: a1 = 8

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x1
slli a1, a0, 0x23
# Result: a1 = 0x8

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 1
slli t1, t0, 64
# Result: t1 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
lui a0,0x12345
addi a0,a0,0x678
slli a1,a0,3
# Result: a1 = 0x91a2b3c0

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x00FF00FF00FF00FF
slli a1, a0, 8
# Result: a1 = 0xFF00FF00FF000000

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x6, 1
slli x5, x6, 4
# Result: x5 = 0x10

# Extension Must Be Active: Zba
addi x10, x0, 1
slli x11, x10, 5
# Result: x11 = 0x20

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0xffffffff
slliw t1, t0, 1
# Result: t1 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 1
slliw a1, a0, 5
# Result: a1 = 0x20

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

slliw t1, t0, 1
# Result: t1 = 0xffffffff80000000

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

slliw t1, t0, 1
# Result: t1 = 0xffffffff80000002

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x5, 0x0000000180000000
slliw x6, x5, 1
# Result: x6 = 0

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0
slliw a1, a0, 0
# Result: a1 = 0

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, 5
slliw a1, a0, 2
# Result: a1 = 20

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, 1
slliw a1, a0, 2
# Result: a1 = 4

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

addi a1, x0, 1
sllw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li x6, 1
sllw x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a2 = 0x1fe0

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

sllw x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 0xffffffff80000001

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li x11, 31

# Result: x12 = 0xffffffff80000000

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

slt x7, x5, x0
# Result: x7 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

addi x6, x0, 3
slt x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t1, x0, -5
addi t2, x0, 3
slt t0, t1, t2
# Result: t0 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
slt a0, x0, x0
# Result: a0 = 0

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, x0, -1
add t1, x0, x0
slt t2, t0, t1
# Result: t2 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t0, x0, -1
slt t1, t0, x0
# Result: t1 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi t1, x0, -1
slt t2, x0, t1
# Result: t2 = 0

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

slti t1, t0, -1
addi t2, x0, -2
slti t3, t2, -1
# Result: t1 = 0 & t3 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, -5
slti x6, x5, -3
# Result: x6 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
slti x5, x6, 1
# Result: x5 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

slti a1, a0, -1
# Result: a1 = 0

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
slti x5, x0, -1
# Result: x5 = 0

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, zero, 5
sltiu a1, a0, 10
# Result: a1 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

sltiu x6, x5, -1
# Result: x6 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
sltiu t0, a0, -1
# Result: t0 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
sltiu a0, x0, 1
# Result: a0 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, 5
addi a1, x0, 10
sltu a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 1

li a1, -1
sltu t0, a0, a1
# Result: t0 = 1

sltu t1, x0, t0
# Result: t1 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

sltu a0, a1, a2
# Result: a0 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

sltu a0, t0, t1
# Result: a0 = 1

# Result: t2 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# Result: t2 = 0x12345678

# Result: x7 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# Result: x3 = 4

# Result: a2 = 0xffffffffc0000000

# Result: x7 = 0xffffffffc0000000

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

li x6, 4

# Result: x7 = 0x0123456789ABCDEF

srl x6, x5, x7
# Result: x6 = 0x12345678

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

srl x7, x6, x0
# Result: x7 = 0x80000000

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

addi x11, x0, 3
srl x12, x10, x11
# Result: x12 = 0x1FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

srl x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 0x7FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a1 = 0x00123456789abcde

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: t1 = 0x7F

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

srli x1, x2, 32
# Result: x1 = 0xffffffff

# Result: a1 = 15

# Result: t1 = 0x0FFFFFFFFFFFFFFF

# Result: t1 = 0xffffffff80000001

# Result: a1 = 0x7fffffff

srliw x12, x10, 2
# Result: x12 = 0x29

# Result: a1 = 0x000000007fffffff

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a1 = 0x000000000ABCDEF0

# Result: a1 = 0xffffffff80000000 & a2 = 0x0000000040000000

# Result: x6 = 0xffffffff80000000

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: t1 = 0x0000000040000000

# Result: x7 = 0x7fffffff

# Result: x11 = 1

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: t3 = 0x0000000000F12345

srlw x5, x6, x7
# Result: x5 = 0xffffffff80000000

# Result: x7 = 2

# Result: a2 = 0x7fffffffffffffff

sub x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 7

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

# Result: a1 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

addi x6, x0, 0x11
subw x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

subw a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 6

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a1, zero, 0
addi a2, zero, 1
subw a0, a1, a2
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE

addi x6, x0, 0
subw x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 0

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x1, x0, 0xF
addi x2, x0, 0xF0
xor x3, x1, x2
# Result: x3 = 0xff

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, 0x55
addi a1, x0, 0xAA
xor a2, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = 0xff

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi x5, x0, -1
addi x6, x0, 1
xor x7, x5, x6
# Result: x7 = 0xfffffffffffffffe

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 0x0123456789abcdef
# Result: a1 = 0xfedcba9876543210

# Extension Must Be Active: Zicond
addi a0, x0, 0x12345678
addi a1, x0, 0xdeadbeef
addi t0, x0, 1
xor a3, a0, a1
# Result: a2 = a3

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
vsetvli t0, x0, e64, m1
li a1, 0xaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
vmv.v.x v1, a1
li a2, 0x5555555555555555
vmv.v.x v2, a2
vxor.vv v3, v2, v1
vmv.x.s a0, v3
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a0, 4
vsetvli t0, a0, e8, m1
li t1, 0xAA
vmv.v.x v2, t1
li t2, 0x55
vxor.vx v3, v2, t2
vmv.x.s a1, v3
# Result: a1 = 0xFF

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
vsetvli a0, zero, e8,m1
li t0, 0xAA
vmv.v.x v2, t0
vxor.vi v1, v2, 0xF
vmv.x.s a0, v1
# Result: a0 = 0xa5

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li t0, 0x5
li t1, 0xA
vsetvli t2, zero, e64, m1
vmv.v.x v1, t0
vmv.v.x v2, t1
vredxor.vs v3, v2, v1, v0
vmv.x.s a0, v3
# Result: a0 = 0xf

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi sp, sp, -8
li t0, 0xdeadbeefdeadbeef
sd t0, 0(sp)
li t1, 0x1111111111111111
amoxor.d a0, t1, (sp)
# Result: a0 = 0xdeadbeefdeadbeef

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
xori a0, x0, -1
# Result: a0 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
xori a0, x0, -1
xori a1, a0, 0xff
# Result: a1 = 0xffffffffffffff00

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
addi a0, x0, -1
xori a0, a0, 0x7ff
# Result: a0 = 0xfffffffffffff800

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li a1, 0x0123456789ABCDEF
xori a0, a1, -1
# Result: a0 = 0xFEDCBA9876543210

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
xori t0, a0, -1
not t1, a0
# Result: t0 = 0xffffffffffffffff & t1 = 0xffffffffffffffff

# Extension Must Be Active: NONE
li x5, 0x12345678abcdef01
xori x5, x5, -1
# Result: x5 = 0xedcba987543210fe

# Extension Must Be Active: Zkr
csrr t0, 0x747
andi t0, t0, 0
# Result: t0 = 0
